extracted_claims: Macro interpretation matters as much as the raw data direction.
4ac27b04-c3e0-4ade-a864-7d86d97de8a5.methodology_summary: Cross-market commentary supported by historical sector-relative performance comparisons.
4ac27b04-c3e0-4ade-a864-7d86d97de8a5.relevance_to_hypothesis: Useful counterweight because it highlights conditional interpretation rather than a one-way macro rule.
4ac27b04-c3e0-4ade-a864-7d86d97de8a5.source: Sell-side or public market strategy research
4ac27b04-c3e0-4ade-a864-7d86d97de8a5.summary: Cooling inflation alone is often insufficient; growth-sensitive outperformance depends on whether the market reads the move as benign easing rather than growth deterioration.
4ac27b04-c3e0-4ade-a864-7d86d97de8a5.title: Sector rotation depends on growth expectations as well as inflation cooling

extracted_claims: Announcement effects are strongest when the surprise component is large.
9a2ebe26-79e1-4f1b-8c0d-93b4ad992df7.methodology_summary: Event-study style measurement around announcement dates.
9a2ebe26-79e1-4f1b-8c0d-93b4ad992df7.relevance_to_hypothesis: Relevant if the hypothesis is framed around CPI prints, labor releases, or other event windows.
9a2ebe26-79e1-4f1b-8c0d-93b4ad992df7.summary: Event-style reactions to macro releases exist, but persistence and sign can vary with the prevailing regime and expectations backdrop.
9a2ebe26-79e1-4f1b-8c0d-93b4ad992df7.title: Macro announcement effects are short horizon and noisy across regimes

extracted_claims: Real-rate moves can affect valuation-sensitive sectors more than the broad market.
9b2191a5-8055-4350-867d-7b8f89d10edf.methodology_summary: Empirical macro-finance framing using historical yield and asset-return relationships.
9b2191a5-8055-4350-867d-7b8f89d10edf.relevance_to_hypothesis: Directly relevant to Investigate semis versus defensives..
9b2191a5-8055-4350-867d-7b8f89d10edf.summary: Falling real yields tend to support duration-sensitive equity segments, though the effect is regime-dependent.
9b2191a5-8055-4350-867d-7b8f89d10edf.title: Real-rate sensitivity of long-duration assets

caveats.detail: Sector composition effects may confound style interpretation.
caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

caveats.detail: Relative-value framing can hide broad market beta effects.
caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

7e19a50f-bff6-4bb5-957f-c971718cd8a9.expected_direction: defensives outperform when the macro signal is interpreted as growth-negative
7e19a50f-bff6-4bb5-957f-c971718cd8a9.label: counterfactual
7e19a50f-bff6-4bb5-957f-c971718cd8a9.mechanism: Investors may interpret the macro signal as slower growth rather than lower discount rates.
7e19a50f-bff6-4bb5-957f-c971718cd8a9.novelty_usefulness_note: Useful falsification card that forces clearer interpretation.
7e19a50f-bff6-4bb5-957f-c971718cd8a9.thesis: If the primary thesis is wrong, defensive sectors should benefit more than growth-sensitive assets under the same macro shift.
7e19a50f-bff6-4bb5-957f-c971718cd8a9.title: Counterfactual defensive rotation

caveats.detail: Regime definitions may be unstable or ex post.
caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

955fbeaa-ca8a-4186-85d0-503e64632377.label: regime
955fbeaa-ca8a-4186-85d0-503e64632377.mechanism: Transmission strength changes when inflation, policy, or recession risk dominates the narrative.
955fbeaa-ca8a-4186-85d0-503e64632377.novelty_usefulness_note: High usefulness for separating unconditional noise from conditional signal.
955fbeaa-ca8a-4186-85d0-503e64632377.thesis: The relationship should be stronger in specific macro regimes than in unconditional full-sample analysis.
955fbeaa-ca8a-4186-85d0-503e64632377.title: Regime-conditional sensitivity

fbecc699-c03a-42e7-b318-b41012796f3e.mechanism: Changes in macro expectations alter discount rates and sector-relative earnings expectations.
